# =========================================================
# Ridge plot for MYOT expression in Myonuclei
# =========================================================
library(ggplot2)
library(ggridges)

plot_data <- read.table("./Figure6F_matrix.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

selected_groups <- c("E38#Myonuclei", "E80#Myonuclei", "PN0#Myonuclei", "PN28#Myonuclei", "PN180#Myonuclei")
plot_data$Period <- factor(plot_data$Period, levels = selected_groups)

group_colors <- c(
  "E38#Myonuclei"   = "#430155",
  "E80#Myonuclei"   = "#31688E",
  "PN0#Myonuclei"   = "#20918D",
  "PN28#Myonuclei"  = "#35B879",
  "PN180#Myonuclei" = "#FEE724"
)

min_non_zero <- min(plot_data$Expression[plot_data$Expression > 0])
max_expr <- max(plot_data$Expression)

ridge_plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Expression, y = Period, fill = Period)) +
  geom_density_ridges(scale = 0.9, alpha = 0.9, rel_min_height = 0.01) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(min_non_zero, max_expr), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(x = "Expression Level", y = NULL) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2), 
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.margin = unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), "cm")
  )

ggsave("Fig6F.pdf", plot = ridge_plot, device = cairo_pdf, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300)
